title: Book of Mormon
text: The Book of Mormon teaches that God delivers His people when they humble themselves and keep His commandments (see Helaman 12).

title: Doctrine & Covenants
text: Modern revelation emphasizes that Zion must be built on principles of justice, mercy, and truth (D&C 97:21).

title: Joseph Smith Translation
text: Restoration scripture clarifies God's covenant relationship with His people, emphasizing repentance and divine mercy.

title: Modern Application
text: Prophets today continue Amos's message by calling for care for the poor and moral integrity.
